text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm?! There seems to be an illicit trade
happening in the corner of the hallway!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
You two suspicious people over there! What are
you hiding?! Show me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
W-w-we aren't suspicious! It's just a perfectly
ordinary book...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Hiding things is a sign of a guilty conscience!
Show me what you have there!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Ah?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Oooh! She saw it! She saw it!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
What's with the that reaction? It's just some
romance manga, right?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: T-that's right!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
This is... it's just me one-sidedly pushing my likes
onto her. Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You aren't interested in romance manga, are you
Bakushin O?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Who? Me?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Let me take a look... "the serious class
representative and the delinquent are drawn
together despite being polar opposites." Hmmm...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Fantastic! Having the class representative as the
main character... It's definitely a stroke of genius!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: R-really? Well, it certainly is a masterpiece...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: This manga's protagonist is a weakling who falls in love and gets stronger... It makes for such great plot progression!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
There are some risque moments as the story
progresses too...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Oh-ho! Getting stronger... risky developments...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Okay! I've made up my mind! I'm going to fall in
love as well!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Falling in love will make my Bakushin stronger! I'll
come out on top no matter how risky the
development.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
And that's the story! To think there was such a
method out there!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
But I've never been in love! How on earth do you
find it?!
choice_data_list: You could try finding someone you care about?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
But I've never been in love! How on earth do you
find it?!
choice_data_list: You could try finding someone you care about?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Hm! What do you do once you find someone?
choice_data_list: You have to tell them how you feel.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
So it's about confessing my everyday affections?
That would definitely feel good!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Confessing your feelings of affection gives you a
sense of warmth, and as a result, your power can
be unleashed... I understand everything now!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I'm going to confess my feelings to
everyone right away! Bakushiiin!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I like you!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Whaaa?! Bakushin O?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I like you!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Huh? That's... well, I also like your straightforward
way of doing things.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Each Umamusume reacts differently, but Sakura
Bakushin O's pilgrimage of confessions leaves
everyone bewildered.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I've more or less finished expressing my
feelings! With this, I should be even stronger!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Ahh! I forgot about someone really important!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I like you too! Thank you for always
supporting me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Whether you confess your feelings to someone or
you are the one confessed to, you can't help but
feel warm and fuzzy on the inside.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite Sakura Bakushin O's actions being far
from what one might call "love," it appears she
gained something in her own way.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't offer her any advice regarding love, so I
offer her my sincere apologies.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
No, no, do not fret! We can just learn about it
together!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Oh, good timing! URARAAA!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Hey Bakushin O! Everything okay?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I'm looking for love advice! Do you have anything
for me?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Well, you know what they say about there being
plenty of fish in the sea! But we're not near an
ocean, so maybe try the pond in the park?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, good thinking! In that case, I have to hurry
over to the park!
choice_data_list: Wait, I think you might've misunders—

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Let's go! I'm angling for love in this here pond, so
let's get this Bakushin started!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I can really tell love is blooming here! It's full of
fish, just like Urara said. I'm pumped!
choice_data_list: Aren't you just... fishing at this point?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Indeed! And I intend to get as many as I can!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I think some wires got crossed along the way,
but... It's easier to accept my fate and fish with
her till she's satisfied.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I can certainly feel it now.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
The thrill of not knowing whether there'll be a
nibble or not... This heart-pounding excitement
must be love!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Those who master fishing also master love! That's
definitely what that saying is all about!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh! Come here, lil' fishies! I'll show you what I
can do!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two of us stick around and catch plenty of
fish.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As we head back, Sakura Bakushin O
triumphantly proclaims that she can feel how
much her strength has grown.
